serviceDescription:
This 1":200' scale imagery is comprised of natural color (RGB) orthoimagery with a GSD (Ground Sample Distance) of 1.0'. Imagery was collected with the Leica ADS40 digital sensor and processed with Leica GPro software. The full sized georeferenced TIFF images were then compressed with Lizardtech MrSID software.

The imagery was obtained May 3, 2010.

Horizontal_Positional_Accuracy_Report: This imagery complies with National Map Accuracy Standards (NMAS) for 1" = 200' scale mapping products. Does not apply to vertical surface features, such as structures, appearing in the digital orthoimagery due to inherent lean.

documentInfo.Comments:
This 1":100' scale imagery is comprised of natural color (RGB)and color infrared (CIR) orthoimagery with a GSD (Ground Sample Distance) of 0.75'. Imagery was collected with the Leica ADS40 digital sensor and processed with Leica GPro software. The full sized georeferenced TIFF images were then compressed with Lizardtech MrSID software.

The imagery was obtained between 2/27/2010 and 3/5/2010.

Horizontal_Positional_Accuracy_Report: This imagery complies with ASPRS Class II standards. It has been tested at 95% confidence level to have an RMS positional displacement within 4' of well defined ground features in obscured areas. Does not apply to vertical surface features, such as structures, appearing in the digital orthoimagery due to inherent lean. Tested horizontal RMSE on controls within the project area is 1.35'.
documentInfo.Subject:
2010 Orthophotography for Nashville / Davidson County, Tennessee.  
Nashville/Davidson 200 scale, 0.75' pixel digital color orthoimagery.
documentInfo.Keywords: Nashville; Davidson County; Tennessee; Ortho; Imagery
